roa.docketEntryComment: CONFIDENTIAL Penal Code 1001.36 Mental Health Diversion Evaluation Report

/CAL:PC 1368 REPORT FROM DR RAMEZANI AND MHD ELIGIBILITY REPORT FROM JPS/NP/X:THE COURT IS IN RECEIPT OF THE PC 1368 REPORT FROM DR RAMEZANI DATED 02-04-22 AND THE MHD ELIGIBILITY REPORT FROM JPS,/X:COUNSEL SUBMIT ON THE REPORTS,/1370REF1/X:THE COURT ORDERS THAT THE TREATMENT FACILITY MAY INVOLUNTARILY ADMINISTER PSYCHOTROPIC MEDICATION TO THE DEFENDANT WHEN AND AS PRESCRIBED BY THE DEFENDANT'S TREATING PSYCHIATRIST,/CONTD:PAROLE PHC, POSSIBLE DISMISSAL IN DEPT 31 (PAROLE COURT) ON 02-08-22/

/CAL:APPOINT ALIENIST/DAWT/CONTD PC 1368 RPT;/TEXT:DEF EXP DOUBT PURS PC 1368;CRIM PROC SUSP;/X:DEFENSE COUNSEL DECLARED DOUBT ON 01-06-22 IN DEPT 31(PAROLE COURT),/TEXT:DR AMIR RAMEZANI APPTD TO EXAM DEFT;/PSYFEE:PC 1368/30 CMHD ELIG RPT FROM JPS/TEXT:CRT ORDS DEFT EXAM PURS PC 1001,36 FOR REFERRAL TO MHD/JAIL PSY/MHD/REP:02-07-22/S14/CONTD:PC 1368 RPT FR DR RAMEZANIAND RECEIPT OF REPORT FROM JPS FOR MENTALHEALTH DIVERSION REFERRAL/

/CAL:PREHEARING CONFERENCE/DAWT/X:PAROLEE'S APPEARANCE WAIVED/X:JUDGE REARDON AND PD IN COURTROOM/X:DA AND PAROLE AGENT JUSTIN LUGAR VIA ZOOM/X:PDDECLARED A DOUBT AS TO THE PAROLEE'S COMPETENCY PER PC 1370,02/CTORD: PAROLE PROVIDE COUNSEL THE FOLLOWING (1) MENTAL HEALTH RECORDS (2) MENTAL HEALTH CASE PLAN AND (3) SUBSTANCE ABUSE RECORDS/X:CRIMINAL PROCEEDINGS NOT SUSPENDED TODAY/CONTD: 01-10-22 APPOINT ALIENIST IN D-14/DOP/

/CAL: PAROLE PREHEARING CONFERENCE AND RECEIPT OF PC 4011,6 REPORT/X: PAROLE AGENT JUSTIN LUGAR APPEARING VIA ZOOM,/CTORD: BEFORE NEXT CALLING OF THIS CASE, PAROLE SHALL PROVIDE TO DEFENSE COUNSEL RECORDS-REPORT RE DEFENDANT'S MENTAL HEALTH DIAGNOSIS, DEFENDANT'S MENTAL HEALTH TREATMENT NEEDS ANDPAROLE'S TREATMENT PLAN/CONTD: PAROLE PREHEARING CONFERENCE AND POSSIBLE TERMINATION OF PAROLE STATUS/

/CAL: PAROLE'S PETITION TO REVOKE PAROLE PURSUANT TO PC3000,08/X: PAROLE AGENT BRANDON LUGAR  APPEARING/CTORD: PAROLE ADMINISTRATIVELY REVOKED/  /PDP/WIAPTR/X: PAROLEE ENTERS A NOT TRUE AS TO THE ALLEGATIONS,/NB/TEXT:CRTORDS DEFT EXAM PURS PC 4011,6/JAIL PSY/4011,6/REP:12-21-21/S14/CONTD: PAROLEE PREHEARING CONFERENCE RECEIPT OF 4011,6PC REPORT AND TO SET12-21-21 INDEPT 31/DOP/
/CTORD:MATTER OFF CALENDAR FOR THE FOLLOWING REASON:PAROLE PETITION IS DISMISED PURSUANT TO 1370,02(B)/
